!
! l3-bgp01 - Generated Configuration
!

configure terminal

no service pad
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service password-encryption
no platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core

hostname l3-bgp01

vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
address-family ipv4
exit-address-family

no logging console

enable secret enc

username admin privilege 15 secret pw

aaa new-model
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authentication enable default enable
aaa authorization exec default local

switch 1 provision c9300-24s

ip domain name example.com

crypto key generate rsa modulus 4096
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh time-out 60

no ip source-route
no service call-home

vtp mode transparent
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree extend system-id
memory free low-watermark processor 134344
redundancy
transceiver type all
monitoring
exit
vlan dot1q tag native

ntp server 10.0.0.10

vlan 120
 name users
exit

vlan 130
 name voice
exit

ip routing

interface Loopback0
description //RID
ip address 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
no shutdown
exit

interface Vlan120
description Users GW
ip address 10.20.0.1 255.255.255.0
ip helper-address 10.0.0.10
no shutdown
exit

interface range GigabitEthernet1/0/1-2
description //Disabled Port
switchport access vlan 
switchport mode access
shutdown
exit

interface vlan1
no ip address
shutdown
exit

interface vlan22
description Site MGMT
ip address 10.0.0.2 255.255.255.248
exit

ip default-gateway 10.0.0.254

router ospf 10
router-id 1.1.1.1
 network 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
 passive-interface default

no router bgp 65001
router bgp 65001
 bgp log-neighbor-changes
 network 198.51.100.0 mask 255.255.255.0
 neighbor 203.0.113.1 remote-as 65000
 neighbor 203.0.113.1 description ISP-A
 neighbor 203.0.113.1 password bgpsecret
 exit
ip route 198.51.100.0 255.255.255.0 Null0

ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.0.254

line con 0
exec-timeout 9 0
line vty 0 4
exec-timeout 9 0
transport input ssh
line vty 5 15
exec-timeout 0 0
transport input none
exit

banner login ^
********************* Warning!!! **********************************

Don't log into my network devices!

*******************************************************************
^

end
